cases.title: TS-26: Student already Present receives 409 DuplicateCheckIn on second check-in attempt
preconditions: Active session with valid room GPS and enrolled authenticated Student A
Student A attendance status is Present from prior successful check-in
Fresh Valid unexpired QrToken from GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/qr/current
Student A coordinates within session gpsRadiusMeters
steps: GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight using Student A session and assert HTTP 200 outcome Valid (BR-04 not evaluated at preflight per validation-rules §3.6a)
POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId, in-radius coordinates, and spoofMetadata using Student A session
Assert HTTP status 409 Conflict
Assert response outcome DuplicateCheckIn and errorCode DuplicateCheckIn
Assert response body includes priorCheckedInAt matching existing Present row checkedInAt
Assert message Bạn đã điểm danh buổi học này rồi per BR-04 outcome specification
Query attendance_records for Student A and sessionId and assert exactly one Present row unchanged
Query check_in_attempts and assert latest attempt outcome DuplicateCheckIn
cases.expected: BR-04 enforced: HTTP 409 DuplicateCheckIn semantics with priorCheckedInAt; no duplicate Present record created for same student in same session

cases.title: CheckInService.submit enforces one Present per student per session in PostgreSQL transaction
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with Active session, enrollment, Pending attendance_records row
Valid qr_tokens row with status Valid
CheckInService wired with AttendanceRecordRepository and QrTokenRepository per checkin-qr module §2.4
steps: Invoke CheckInService.submit with valid tokenId and in-radius locationPayload for studentId (first call)
Assert attendance transitions to Present and qr_token status Consumed
Invoke CheckInService.submit again for same studentId with new Valid tokenId
Assert second call returns DuplicateCheckIn without creating second Present row
Verify unique constraint on (session_id, student_id) per domain model §4.8
cases.expected: Module boundary enforces BR-04: at most one automated Present per student per session; duplicate rejected at CheckInService layer

cases.title: TS-28: Parallel duplicate check-in requests from same student yield exactly one Present
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database running with serializable or row-lock isolation
Active session, enrolled student with Pending attendance, Valid QrToken
DuplicateRace integration suite per testing-plan §5
TestClock within attendance window and token TTL
steps: Fire two parallel POST /api/v1/check-in or CheckInService.submit calls for same studentId and sessionId
Collect both HTTP responses or CheckInResult outcomes
Assert exactly one response is HTTP 200 outcome Success with attendance Present
Assert the other response is HTTP 409 outcome DuplicateCheckIn
Query attendance_records and assert exactly one Present row for studentId and sessionId
Query check_in_attempts and assert one Success and one DuplicateCheckIn outcome
cases.expected: BR-04 concurrency invariant: exactly one Present per student per session under parallel load; loser receives DuplicateCheckIn per AC-09c

cases.title: POST /check-in returns 409 DuplicateCheckIn envelope when student already Present
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student session with Present attendance for target session
Valid unexpired QrToken for Active session
steps: Send POST /api/v1/check-in with body { tokenId, latitude: 10.762700, longitude: 106.660200, spoofMetadata: { mockLocationDetected: false } }
Assert HTTP status 409 Conflict
Assert Content-Type application/json; charset=utf-8
Assert response body outcome DuplicateCheckIn and errorCode DuplicateCheckIn
Assert response body message Bạn đã điểm danh buổi học này rồi
Assert response body priorCheckedInAt is ISO-8601 timestamp of prior successful check-in
Assert no attendance field with updated Present on failure envelope per API design §6.3
cases.expected: HTTP 409 DuplicateCheckIn contract per validation-rules §4 BR-04 mapping and API design §6.3 idempotency note

cases.title: Duplicate check-in leaves attendance afterState Present unchanged (no second transition)
preconditions: attendance_records row with beforeState Present and non-null checkedInAt
Active session and Valid QrToken for duplicate attempt
CheckInService.submit callable for same studentId
steps: Record beforeState: status Present, checkedInAt T0
Invoke CheckInService.submit with new valid tokenId
Assert result outcome DuplicateCheckIn (not Success)
Query attendance_records and assert afterState status still Present
Assert checkedInAt unchanged at T0 (no overwrite)
Verify SM-04 outcome DuplicateCheckIn maps to no attendance state change per 07-state-machines.md §5
cases.expected: beforeState Present; afterState Present unchanged; BR-04 DuplicateCheckIn is terminal rejection without duplicate Present record

cases.title: Flow B step 3: Student A duplicate retry returns DuplicateCheckIn after successful check-in
preconditions: Flow B steps 1–2 complete: Active session with valid QR, Student A checked in successfully
Student A attendance Present with consumed token from step 2
Fresh Valid QrToken available for duplicate attempt
steps: Student A GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight with fresh Valid tokenId and assert HTTP 200 outcome Valid
Student A POST /api/v1/check-in again with fresh Valid tokenId and in-radius coordinates
Assert HTTP 409 with outcome DuplicateCheckIn and errorCode DuplicateCheckIn
Assert response body includes priorCheckedInAt matching Student A checkedInAt from step 2
Assert Vietnamese message Bạn đã điểm danh buổi học này rồi
Query attendance_records and assert exactly one Present row for Student A
Verify Flow B anti-fraud path step 3 per testing-plan §6 Flow B tags BR-04
cases.expected: Flow B validates BR-04 duplicate student rejection immediately after first successful check-in in anti-fraud e2e flow

cases.title: Instructor denied POST /check-in preventing proxy check-in via staff account
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor session available
Active session with Valid QrToken and in-radius coordinates
Instructor role lacks checkin:submit per roles-permissions §2.2
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with valid tokenId and coordinates using Instructor session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden and errorCode Forbidden
Verify no Present attendance created for instructor userId
Assert permission guard runs at pipeline step 3 before BR-04 duplicate evaluation at step 10 per validation-rules §5.1
cases.expected: Only Student role holds checkin:submit; staff accounts cannot bypass one-student-per-account rule via instructor login per BR-04 anti-proxy scope

cases.title: Duplicate check-in by Present student does not consume submitted token for other students
preconditions: Student A already Present for session
Fresh Valid QrToken T1 not yet consumed
Student B enrolled with Pending attendance awaiting check-in
steps: Student A POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId T1 and assert HTTP 409 DuplicateCheckIn
Query qr_tokens for T1 and assert status remains Valid (not Consumed)
Student B GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/T1/preflight and assert HTTP 200 outcome Valid
Student B POST /api/v1/check-in with same tokenId T1 and in-radius coordinates
Assert Student B HTTP 200 outcome Success and attendance Present
Query qr_tokens for T1 and assert status Consumed after Student B success
cases.expected: BR-04 DuplicateCheckIn failure does not consume token per domain model §5.2; token remains available for legitimate second student until successful consumption

cases.title: Student with Excused status after successful check-in blocked from second automated check-in
preconditions: Student completed successful check-in (was Present) then instructor manually set status Excused within edit window
BR-04 condition: Present or Excused set after successful check-in blocks duplicate
Active session with fresh Valid QrToken and in-radius coordinates
steps: Query attendance_records and confirm status Excused with prior checkedInAt populated
Invoke CheckInService.submit with new valid tokenId for same studentId and sessionId
Assert outcome DuplicateCheckIn
Query attendance_records and assert status remains Excused (not second Present)
Verify BR-04 exception scope: no exceptions — Excused after check-in still counts as one successful check-in per session
cases.expected: BR-04 condition covers Excused set after successful check-in; duplicate automated check-in rejected with no second Present record

cases.title: Mobile check-in shows DuplicateCheckIn message with prior check-in time and history link
preconditions: Authenticated Student on mobile viewport 375×812 with Present attendance for session
Active session with valid check-in deep link /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId
VITE_ENABLE_DEVICE_SIMULATION=true with gpsSim=delay query param for harness in-room coordinates
Preflight returns HTTP 200 outcome Valid per BR-04 evaluated at POST only (TC-BR-04-017)
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId&gpsSim=delay deep link where student is already Present
Assert validating_token inline spinner on scan step during GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight per ui-states §4.1
Assert data-testid gps-capture-step absent until preflight HTTP 200 outcome Valid per BR-15
Assert GpsCaptureStep mounts after preflight pass with session summary visible
Wait for GpsCaptureStep ready substate per ui-states §4.2: check icon visible, copy Vị trí đã sẵn sàng, no Spinner in GPS region, submit region aria-busy false, Xác nhận điểm danh enabled
Tap Xác nhận điểm danh submit control
Verify CheckInOutcomePanel DuplicateCheckIn variant per ui-states §4.3: info wash (--color-info-50), History icon, message Bạn đã điểm danh buổi học này rồi per user-flows §3
Verify prior check-in timestamp displayed from priorCheckedInAt in API response
Verify primary CTA Xem lịch sử navigates to /history
cases.expected: BR-04 surfaced in mobile web UI after BR-15 preflight pass and AC-08f-ready GPS step; DuplicateCheckIn outcome panel shows prior timestamp and history CTA per ui-states §4.3

cases.title: AttendanceRecordRepository unique (session_id, student_id) prevents duplicate Present rows at DB layer
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database is running
attendance_records row exists with status Present for sessionId and studentId
Direct repository or raw SQL insert attempted bypassing CheckInService
steps: Attempt to insert second attendance_records row with same sessionId and studentId and status Present
Assert database unique constraint violation is raised
Query attendance_records and assert count equals 1 for sessionId and studentId pair
Contrast with CheckInService.submit returning DuplicateCheckIn before constraint hit in normal path
cases.expected: BR-04 enforced at persistence layer via unique (session_id, student_id) invariant per domain model §4.8 and invariant enforcement matrix §10

cases.title: DuplicateRace: 20 concurrent CheckInService.submit calls for same student produce one Present
preconditions: DuplicateRace integration suite per testing-plan §5
Active session with enrolled student Pending attendance
20 parallel workers each holding valid tokenId (unique tokens or controlled race fixture)
TestClock within attendance window and token TTL
steps: Launch 20 parallel CheckInService.submit invocations for identical studentId and sessionId
Await all completions
Count Success vs DuplicateCheckIn outcomes across results
Assert exactly 1 Success and 19 DuplicateCheckIn (or 1 Success and remainder rejected)
Query attendance_records and assert single Present row with one checkedInAt timestamp
cases.expected: BR-04 concurrency drill passes: row-level lock on attendance prevents double Present under parallel load per NFR-02 integrity

cases.title: Duplicate check-in returns 409 DuplicateCheckIn before OutOfRadius when student already Present
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student with Present attendance for Active session
Valid unexpired QrToken for session
Student coordinates deliberately outside session gpsRadiusMeters
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with valid tokenId and out-of-radius coordinates using Student session
Assert HTTP status 409 with outcome DuplicateCheckIn (not OutOfRadius)
Assert errorCode DuplicateCheckIn takes precedence per validation-rules §5.1 step 10 before step 13 radius check
Assert response body includes priorCheckedInAt matching existing Present row checkedInAt
Verify check_in_attempts logged with outcome DuplicateCheckIn not OutOfRadius
cases.expected: BR-04 evaluated at pipeline step 10 before BR-02 radius (step 13); DuplicateCheckIn short-circuits pipeline per validation-rules §5.1 and rule interaction matrix §8 order 5

cases.title: Sequential duplicate submissions: first 200 Success then second 409 without duplicate Present rows
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student with Pending attendance
Two sequential Valid QrTokens T1 and T2 for Active session
In-radius coordinates and TestClock within window
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId T1 and assert HTTP 200 outcome Success
Immediately POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId T2 for same student
Assert HTTP 409 outcome DuplicateCheckIn on second request
Query attendance_records and assert count of Present rows for studentId and sessionId equals 1
Verify error-handling §9 Duplicate check-in drill expected outcome
cases.expected: Sequential boundary: first submission wins Present; immediate retry returns 409 DuplicateCheckIn per BR-04 with no exceptions

cases.title: Student check-in outcome panel shows anti-proxy duplicate message without allowing resubmit
preconditions: Authenticated Student on mobile viewport with Present attendance for Active session
Fresh QR deep link available for same session
VITE_ENABLE_DEVICE_SIMULATION=true with gpsSim=delay for harness in-room coordinates
Preflight returns HTTP 200 outcome Valid per BR-04 evaluated at POST only (TC-BR-04-017)
steps: Open /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId&gpsSim=delay deep link and assert validating_token spinner on scan step during GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight per ui-states §4.1
Assert data-testid gps-capture-step absent until preflight HTTP 200 outcome Valid per BR-15
Assert GpsCaptureStep mounts after preflight pass with session summary visible
Complete GPS capture to ready substate per ui-states §4.2 and tap Xác nhận điểm danh
Observe CheckInOutcomePanel DuplicateCheckIn variant per ui-states §4.3 with message Bạn đã điểm danh buổi học này rồi
Verify submit control is disabled or replaced with guidance after duplicate rejection
Verify no success badge or Present confirmation shown
Verify panel does not offer retry with same session without navigating to history via Xem lịch sử CTA
cases.expected: BR-04 duplicate rejection UX prevents repeated submission attempts; student cannot obtain second Present via UI for same session

cases.title: BR-04 blocks duplicate only for Present or Excused-after-check-in; Pending student may still check in
preconditions: Active session with two enrolled students: Student A Present, Student B Pending
Valid QrTokens available for both students
In-radius coordinates for both
steps: Invoke CheckInService.submit for Student A and assert DuplicateCheckIn
Invoke CheckInService.submit for Student B with valid tokenId
Assert Student B outcome Success and attendance transitions Pending to Present
Query attendance_records and assert Student A still Present and Student B now Present
Assert exactly one Present row per student per session
cases.expected: BR-04 scope is per-student per-session; duplicate rule does not block other enrolled students from checking in

cases.title: Preflight read-only chain passes for Present student; DuplicateCheckIn enforced only at POST submit
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with Active session, enrolled Student A with attendance status Present
Fresh Valid unexpired QrToken not yet consumed
Authenticated Student A session with checkin:submit permission
steps: Invoke GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight with Student A session
Assert HTTP status 200 and outcome Valid with session summary (classCode, subjectCode, roomName, status Active)
Verify preflight chain per validation-rules §3.6a: token exists → status Valid → session Active → enrollment confirmed
Query attendance_records and qr_tokens and assert no writes from preflight alone
Invoke POST /api/v1/check-in with same tokenId and in-radius coordinates
Assert HTTP status 409 outcome DuplicateCheckIn with priorCheckedInAt per BR-04 evaluated at submit layer only
cases.expected: BR-15 preflight is read-only and does not evaluate BR-04 duplicate guard; DuplicateCheckIn rejection occurs only at POST pipeline step 10 per validation-rules §5.1

cases.title: gpsSim query params ignored when VITE_ENABLE_DEVICE_SIMULATION=false on duplicate check-in path
preconditions: Web build compiled with VITE_ENABLE_DEVICE_SIMULATION=false (production default per AC-08e)
Authenticated enrolled Student already Present for Active session
Fresh Valid unexpired QrToken; GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight returns 200 outcome Valid
Check-in deep link includes gpsSim=delay and gpsLat/gpsLng in-room coordinates
steps: Load /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId&gpsSim=delay&gpsLat=10.762700&gpsLng=106.660200 in browser with simulation flag off
Verify client does not auto-resolve simulated coordinates from gpsSim or gpsLat/gpsLng query params
Verify browser geolocation API is invoked (or permission prompt shown) instead of simulation layer
Without granting real GPS, assert student cannot reach DuplicateCheckIn outcome panel solely from gpsSim params
Grant mocked in-radius geolocation, complete submit, and assert HTTP 409 DuplicateCheckIn with priorCheckedInAt per BR-04
cases.expected: AC-08e/NFR-24 production path applies to BR-04 duplicate flow: sim-disabled builds ignore gpsSim URL params; DuplicateCheckIn reached only after real GPS capture and POST /check-in
